title: 57: Posture Pal - Jordi Bruin
description:
Jordi Bruin joins the show to talk about his large library of iOS and macOS apps and his 2-2-2 approach to building apps quickly. Edited by Jonathan Ruiz Episode Sponsors RevenueCat Links & Show Notes Jordi's Twitter
